title: Tabller's RPG World
body:
# About
It's vanilla-like RPG World. There aren't too much of UI or overpowered items.  
There are total *65 mods*, including libraries. The main thing in this modpack is **exploration.**  
Basically, my modpack has:

> - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) with [combat roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll) and shield overhaul system.
> - [Cool bosses](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction), plus [epic ender dragon boss](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-ending). Even the [nether bosses](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez)...
> - Vanilla-look [mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes). However, [**those**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-waters)... scare me.
> - Tons of [new weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) and armor. Really tons...
> - [MAGIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)... in addition to that, [lots of potions](https://modrinth.com/mod/extraalchemy).
> - A variety of structures in all three dimensions of minecraft to explore.
  

Have fun!
